failedAssertions.reason: Unauthenticated JSON POST returned a GraphQL auth error instead of data.__typename = Query.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked on the assigned read-only surface: there is no root query to enumerate issues or users, and issue(id) requires an undiscoverable opaque ID. Without mutating data or using out-of-band database/code knowledge, a real-surface query cannot reach a User instance to confirm isMe: true.

appliedUpdates.description: Added curl flow validator isolation guidance and documented the foundation isMe validation caveat for future runs.
